name_en: M13911 Double Card Holder! Black Gradient! This card holder features a fresh and stylish look with the new Monogram Eclipse coated canvas material. It is compact and fits easily into a pocket. It comes with a central pocket and four slots for credit cards, travel tickets, and business cards.
name_cn:
M13911 Double Card Holder! Black Gradient! This card holder features a fresh and stylish look with the new Monogram Eclipse coated canvas material. It is compact and fits easily into a pocket. It comes with a central pocket and four slots for credit cards, travel tickets, and business cards.
Size: 11 x 7 x 1.5 cm.
